Deliverables

See What We Deliver

From raw flight data to actionable intelligence — browse sample deliverables across all our output types.

Orthomosaics

Georeferenced aerial maps stitched from overlapping images with sub-centimeter GSD (Ground Sample Distance). Perfect for site planning, progress tracking, and volumetric analysis.

Construction Site

50-acre commercial development, ±2cm accuracy

Solar Installation

Roof analysis with multispectral data overlay

Agricultural Land

Precision crop monitoring across 120-acre parcel

Available Formats

GeoTIFF JPEG PDF

3D Point Clouds

Dense 3D models with millions of points and survey-grade accuracy (±2cm). Ideal for volumetric calculations, design verification, and creating digital twins of your site.

Quarry Stockpile

12 million points, volumetric analysis included

Rooftop Survey

Colorized point cloud with RGB from imagery

Mine Pit Analysis

18 million points for precise volume calculation

Available Formats

LAS LAZ XYZ OBJ

Progress Monitoring

Scheduled time-series data captures track changes over weeks and months. Compare datasets, verify completion milestones, and maintain visual evidence of project advancement.

→
→

Commercial Building Construction

12-week progress monitoring with bi-weekly captures and change detection analysis

Available Formats

PDF Report GeoTIFF Video (MP4)

Reports & Analytics

Comprehensive annotated reports with measurement annotations, volumetric calculations, thermal analysis, and vegetation indices (NDVI). Tailored for your specific project needs.

📐 Annotations

Measurement overlays and distance calculations

📊 Volumes

Precise cubic yard and ton calculations

🌱 NDVI Maps

Vegetation health and crop vigor analysis

🔥 Thermal

Temperature mapping and anomaly detection

Available Formats

PDF CSV Custom

Supported Data Formats

All deliverables are compatible with industry-standard CAD, GIS, and BIM platforms including AutoCAD, ArcGIS, Pix4D, DroneDeploy, and more.

TIF
Georeferenced raster format with spatial reference data
LAS
Standard point cloud format, uncompressed
LAZ
Compressed point cloud format, smaller file size
XYZ
ASCII point cloud format for universal compatibility
OBJ
3D mesh format for visualization and CAD import
DXF
AutoCAD drawing format for design integration
DWG
AutoCAD native format for professional workflows
PDF
Portable document format for reports and presentations
3D PDF
Interactive 3D models embedded in PDF documents
CSV
Spreadsheet format for data analysis and calculations
JPEG
Compressed image format for quick sharing and viewing
MP4
Video format for time-lapse and progress documentation
